findings.summary: 6 regression areas mapped: (1) install-cli ghost import needs module creation, (2) TuiEvent module deleted in TUI removal — needs recreation, (3) Settings interface missing 3 properties for session-viz + onboarding features, (4) 82 type errors in tool files (error channel + Schema annotations + registry init), (5) fence.ts middleware OK - sync Database.use(), (6) DuckDB test blocked by Area 2
Plan created with 4 independent packets: A-TuiEvent, B-Settings, C-install-cli, D-registry. Pre-existing fixes from other sessions reduce tool error channel work.
Blocking finding: Packet B pseudocode doesn't match actual settings.tsx pattern. Must use store.general?.propName with setStore(), not settings.general.propName with update().
All 4 target paths are free of conflicts. No active claims from other sessions.
Packet A (TuiEvent): Created packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/tui/event.ts with BusEvent.define for ToastShow, CommandExecute, PromptAppend, SessionSelect
Packet B (Settings): Added showSessionViz, setShowSessionViz, onboarded, setOnboarded to settings.tsx interface, defaults, accessors and setters. Green typecheck.
Packet C (install-cli): Created packages/desktop/src/main/install-cli.ts with execFile('opencode --version') and error wrapping. Desktop typecheck passes.
Packet D (registry): Added yield* RecordStressWaveTool/RecordExecutionWaveTool init and switched Tool.init() to unwrapped variables. Already partially applied by prior session.
Session fully documented with archive records, change manifest, and session reports. 4 JSON artifacts created.
